name: Spinner
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Spinner helper with local inline SVG rendering, status semantics, and examples across badges, buttons, items, input groups, RTL, custom icons, and sizes.

registry.reason: Spinner badge examples compose the local shadcn Badge registry item.
Spinner button examples compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Spinner Input Group examples compose the local shadcn Input Group registry item.
SpinnerEmpty composes the local shadcn Empty registry item now that plan 074 provides it.
Spinner demo and RTL examples compose the local shadcn Item registry item.
Spinner uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema style options for Spinner metadata.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin icon package usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin RTL language selector usage is replaced by deterministic local RTL labels.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: SpinnerDemo
examples.description: Spinner composed inside a muted Item row.
examples.distinguishes: Spinner composed inside a muted Item row.

examples.title: SpinnerBadge
examples.description: Badge variants with inline-start Spinner icons.
examples.distinguishes: Badge variants with inline-start Spinner icons.

examples.title: SpinnerButton
examples.description: Disabled Button variants with inline-start Spinner icons.
examples.distinguishes: Disabled Button variants with inline-start Spinner icons.

examples.title: SpinnerCustom
examples.description: Custom local loader icon preserving the origin status and animation footprint.
examples.distinguishes: Custom local loader icon preserving the origin status and animation footprint.

examples.title: SpinnerInputGroup
examples.description: Input Group examples with disabled controls and Spinner addons.
examples.distinguishes: Input Group examples with disabled controls and Spinner addons.

examples.title: SpinnerEmpty
examples.description: Empty state composed with Spinner media and a cancel action.
examples.distinguishes: Empty state composed with Spinner media and a cancel action.

examples.title: SpinnerRtl
examples.description: RTL Item row using deterministic local Arabic strings.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Item row using deterministic local Arabic strings.

examples.title: SpinnerSize
examples.description: Spinner size overrides through class canonicalization.
examples.distinguishes: Spinner size overrides through class canonicalization.

deviations.summary: Loader icons and RTL labels use local inline SVGs and deterministic strings instead of lucide-react and the origin language selector runtime.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react or the origin app language selector. Local SVGs and labels preserve the rendered footprint needed by Spinner examples.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Spinner helper with local inline SVG rendering, status semantics, and examples across badges, buttons, items, input groups, RTL, custom icons, and sizes.
